creator: foodanchor28@gmail.com
text:
It appears that the nimlsp project has various Linux-specific assumptions that must be adjusted in order to compile on FreeBSD. As it is, nimble will be unable to complete the assignment. Building nimlsp will require either an upstream patch to include the nimsuggest code and become aware of FreeBSD directory locations, or a port to obtain the other necessary files and alter nimlsp. 
https://geometrydash-unblocked.com
